content.text:
[cron:ea289f91-c82f-452c-94b4-6abd6ce87f64 retry-jetton-monitor-build] 检查 Jetton Monitor GitHub Actions 构建状态。如果最新构建失败或未开始，重新触发 Windows 构建工作流。repo: hiyaScott/jetton-monitor
Current time: Monday, March 16th, 2026 — 2:48 PM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
用户有一个 cron 任务，需要我检查 Jetton Monitor 的 GitHub Actions 构建状态。如果最新构建失败或未开始，需要重新触发 Windows 构建工作流。

让我先检查 GitHub Actions 的状态。我需要：
1. 使用 gh CLI 检查最新的工作流运行状态
2. 如果失败或未开始，触发 Windows 构建工作流

让我先执行检查。

details.error:
To get started with GitHub CLI, please run:  gh auth login
Alternatively, populate the GH_TOKEN environment variable with a GitHub API authentication token.

Command exited with code 4

message.errorMessage: 429 {"error":{"type":"rate_limit_error","message":"The engine is currently overloaded, please try again later"},"type":"error"}
429 {"error":{"type":"rate_limit_error","message":"The engine is currently overloaded, please try again later"},"type":"error"}
429 {"error":{"type":"rate_limit_error","message":"The engine is currently overloaded, please try again later"},"type":"error"}

content.thinking: 需要先进行 GitHub 认证。让我检查是否有 GH_TOKEN 环境变量或者需要手动设置。

arguments.command: export GH_TOKEN=${GITHUB_TOKEN:-$GH_TOKEN} && gh auth status 2>&1 || echo "Token not available"

content.text:
You are not logged into any GitHub hosts. To log in, run: gh auth login
Token not available

details.aggregated:

content.thinking: GitHub CLI 没有认证。我需要用不同的方式来做这件事。让我用 curl 直接访问 GitHub API。

- 最新运行 (Run #3): status="completed", conclusion="success"
- 创建时间: 2026-03-16T04:36:59Z (北京时间 12:36)
- 完成时间: 2026-03-16T04:47:45Z (北京时间 12:47)
- 提交信息: "fix: use direct rustup install instead of dtolnay/rust-action"

这个构建是成功的，所以我不需要重新触发。让我再检查一下是否有其他工作流运行可能需要关注，比如最近是否有新的提交触发的构建。

让我查看更多细节，特别是最新的提交是否有对应的构建。
